/usr/bin/clang++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/HairSimu.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HairSimu.dir/src/HairSimulation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HairSimu.dir/src/HairModelLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HairSimu.dir/src/ShadingModels.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HairSimu.dir/src/Experiment.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HairSimu.dir/src/Viewer.cpp.o -o HairSimu  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib -framework OpenGL /opt/homebrew/lib/libglfw.3.4.dylib
